title: Capabilities contract (v0.1)
description: Declarative source of truth for the door/room/store capability surface. Validated against both the TS and Rust implementations. See contract/INVARIANTS.md for I1-I5.

doors.description: The full door catalog. `mountable` doors can be forwarded into a box as a room door (keeper/net/scout/auth/beads); non-mountable doors are control-plane doors (launcher/dispatch) that a dispatchable room may never hold (I2).

bootRequired.description: Part of the always-on core fleet asserted before launcherd-rs will serve. Only meaningful for mountable doors (I4).

autoDoors.description: Doors every dispatched box additionally receives, on top of its room's doors (I3). Must be mountable.

rooms.description: The room table. `dispatchable` rooms are the launcherd dispatch allow-list; they may hold only mountable doors and never open ambient egress (I2).

netOpen.description: UNSAFE ambient egress escape. A dispatchable room may never set this (I2).

stores.description: Persistent volumes and their single writer (I5). Exactly one writer per volume.
